dyana.decode.ipu#

IPU construction utilities.

Functions

count_ipu_starts_after_leak(base_states)

Count IPU starts whose previous contiguous segment label is LEAK.

extract_ipus(states, timebase, target_label, ...)

Classes

Segment(start_time, end_time, label)

class dyana.decode.ipu.Segment(start_time: 'float', end_time: 'float', label: 'str')[source]#

Bases: object

Parameters:

  • start_time (float)

  • end_time (float)

  • label (str)

end_time: float#
label: str#
start_time: float#
dyana.decode.ipu.count_ipu_starts_after_leak(base_states)[source]#

Count IPU starts whose previous contiguous segment label is LEAK.

Notes

  • IPU start labels are A, B, OVL.

  • Uses collapsed contiguous segments from base-state sequence.

Parameters:

base_states (Sequence[str])

Return type:

int

dyana.decode.ipu.extract_ipus(states, timebase, target_label, *, min_duration_s)[source]#
Parameters:

  • states (Sequence[str])

  • timebase (TimeBase)

  • target_label (str)

  • min_duration_s (float)

Return type:

List[Segment]
